workflow: Pinterest Content ideas board → CheapAIAPI/Nano Banana reference-edit → ffmpeg WebP 1600x900
preservation_rule: Preserve 95%+ of the Pinterest reference; adapt the two existing chart panels to 16:9 and replace text through neural edits only. No blank generation or local text overlay.
visual_inspection: Pass: exact text, two original chart panels retained, clean white 16:9 composition, continuous frames, no people, logos, unsafe content, or page-level hero rendering. Readable at card size.
selection_note: Official Pinterest API required renewed app-owner 2FA in this runtime. The reference came from the complete local Content ideas index dated 2026-06-16 and was checked against GBrain used/avoid records and every public image sidecar before use.
